description: Small fragment of a legal document in the hand of Yosef b. Shemuel b. Saʿadya ha-Levi (ca. 1181–1209). Mentions Abū l-ʿIzz al-Sukkarī. Signed on verso by [Yo]sef ha-Levi b. [...] and [...] b. Shemuʾel (all this might be a single signature). (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
